"RUS"={
	country="RUS"
	48={
		first_name="Pyotr III"
		family="c:RUS.fam:Romanov"
		birth_date=1728.01.01
		death_date=1762.01.01
		culture="russian"
		religion="orthodox"
		no_traits=yes
		dna=""
	}
	144={
		first_name="Yekaterina II"
		nickname=" the Great"
		family="c:RUS.fam:Romanov"
		birth_date=1729.01.01
		# [#329 boot-test] REMOVED death_date=1796.01.01. The engine's setup snapshot treats ANY
		# character carrying a death_date as already-dead when it evaluates set_as_ruler, so this
		# threw "set_as_ruler ... Yekaterina II ... is not alive" (error.log) and RUS fell back to
		# an engine auto-pick (the infant Aleksandr I / random "Grigoriy Bulganin" the user saw).
		# Setup rulers must NOT carry a death_date (0/94 Invictus setup rulers do); natural death
		# is handled by the age/history system after load.
		culture="north_german"
		religion="orthodox"
		no_traits=yes
		female=yes
		# [bookmark-1763 #320 B1/B2] Catherine II ('the Great') was Empress of Russia on 1763.2.16
		# (r.1762-1796). #240 removed the UNBORN Aleksandr I (b.1777) as ruler but left NO ruler set,
		# so the engine generated a random placeholder (the 'Grigoriy Bulganin' the boot test showed).
		# Seat Catherine II — she is alive at the start and heads the Romanov dynasty here.
		c:RUS={
			set_as_ruler=char:144
		}
		dna=""
	}
	145={
		first_name="Pavel I"
		family="c:RUS.fam:Romanov"
		birth_date=1754.01.01
		# [logfix death_date>1763.2.16] removed death_date=1801.01.01 (setup snapshot reads any death_date as already-dead; age system handles natural death after load)
		mother="char:144"
		father="char:48"
		culture="russian"
		religion="orthodox"
		no_traits=yes
		dna=""
	}
	146={
